title:
Lesson 1:
See You / See You There
description: 'GĂ¶rĂĽĹźĂĽrĂĽz' = See you (literally: we will see each other). Add a location: 'Evde gĂ¶rĂĽĹźĂĽrĂĽz' = See you at home, 'KĂ¶Ĺźede gĂ¶rĂĽĹźĂĽrĂĽz' = See you at the corner.

dialogue.speaker: A

title:
Lesson 2:
Until Tomorrow / Take Care
description: 'Durakta gĂ¶rĂĽĹźĂĽrĂĽz' = See you at the bus stop. 'Ä°stasyonda gĂ¶rĂĽĹźĂĽrĂĽz' = See you at the station. 'YarÄ±n gĂ¶rĂĽĹźĂĽrĂĽz' = See you tomorrow. 'Kendine iyi bak' = Take care of yourself.

dialogue.speaker: B

title:
